zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Isham於1438年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾可利普斯頓時，他的父親Robert Isham36歲，母親Margaret29歲。他於大約1457年與Alice Knutson在英國諾薩普頓史爾利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1480年住在英國倫敦。他於1477年在英國被列為justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville。他去世於1491年5月9日在英國諾薩普頓史爾可利普斯頓享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Isham于1438年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾可利普斯頓时，他的父亲Robert Isham36岁，母亲Margaret29岁。他于大约1457年与Alice Knutson在英国諾薩普頓史爾利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1480年住在英国倫敦。他于1477年在英国被列为justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville。他去世于1491年5月9日在英国諾薩普頓史爾可利普斯頓享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): habitational name from Isham, Northamptonshire. See   Isom  , compare   Esham  .

variants.name: Esham
meanings: English: variant of   Isham  . This surname is no longer found in Britain.
History: The name is first recorded in Northamton County, VA, when Daniel Esham came over as an indentured servant in 1651.

variants.name: Isom
meanings: English (Essex): habitational name from Isham in Northamptonshire. The placename is derived from the river name Ise (of Celtic origin) + Old English hām ‘homestead’.

variants.name: Ishman
meanings: English: possibly an altered form of   Isham  .

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Isham was born in 1438, in Clipston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert Isham, was 36 and his mother, Margaret, was 29. He married Alice Knutson about 1457, in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He lived in London, England in 1480. In 1477, at the age of 39, his occupation is listed as justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville in England. He died on 9 May 1491, in Clipston, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 53.

fr.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Isham est né en 1438, à Clipston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Isham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Alice Knutson environ 1457, à Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il a vécu à Londres, Angleterre en 1480. En 1477, à l’âge de 39 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville à Angleterre. Il est décédé le 9 mai 1491, à Clipston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, England
de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Isham 1438 in Clipston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Isham 36 und seine Mutter Margaret 29. Er hat um 1457 in Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England Alice Knutson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. 1480 hat er in London, England gelebt. 1477, als er 39 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville in England aufgeführt. Er starb am 9. Mai 1491 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Clipston, Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Isham è nato il nel 1438 nel Clipston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert Isham, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Alice Knutson circa 1457, nel Pytchley, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Vissuto a London, England nel 1480. Nel 1477, all'età di 39 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville nel England. Morì il 9 maggio 1491, nel Clipston, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Ishamが1438年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクリプストンで生まれた時，父Robert Ishamは36歳，母Margaretは29歳であった。約1457年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアプイトチリーでAlice Knutsonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1480年にはイギリスロンドンに住んでいた。1477年，39歳の時，イギリスでの職業はjustice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodvilleと記録されている。彼は1491年5月9日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクリプストンで53歳で死去した。

ko.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: 영국 미들레세스 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Richard Isham(이)가 1438년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 클립스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Isham(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1457년 영국 노르섬프토실르 p이트클리에서 Alice Knutson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1480년도에 영국 런던에서 살았다. 1477년, 39세의 나이로 그의 직업은 영국에서 justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville이었다. 그는 1491년 5월 9일 영국 노르섬프토실르 클립스턴에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Middlesex, Inglaterra
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Isham nasceu em 1438, em Clipston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Isham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Knutson aproximadamente 1457, em Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele viveu em London, Inglaterra em 1480. Em 1477, com 39 anos, sua profissão aparece como justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville em Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 9 de maio de 1491, em Clipston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos.

ru.Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Midd: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Isham родился в 1438 г. в местности клипстон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert Isham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Knutson около 1457 г. в местности пичли, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он жил в местности Лондон, Англия в 1480 году. В 1477 году, в возрасте 39 лет,  он работал по профессии justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville в местности Англия. Он умер 9 мая 1491 г. в местности клипстон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Isham nació en 1438, en Clipston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Isham, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Alice Knutson aproximadamente 1457, en Pytchley, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Vivió en London, Inglaterra en 1480. En 1477, a la edad de 39 años, su ocupación registrada era justice in eyre for the forests of queen elizabeth woodville en Inglaterra. Murió el 9 de mayo de 1491, en Clipston, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años.
